title: Zava Unlimited lab manifest
description: Declarative contract every lab provides. Read by labs/lab.ps1 (launcher) and labs/sim.ps1 (meta-simulator).

schemaVersion.description: Manifest schema version. Always 1 for now.

name.description: Stable kebab-case identifier. Must match the lab's directory name.

displayName.description: Human-readable lab name shown in pickers (e.g. 'Zava Power — ZeroOps').

subsidiary.description: Which Zava Unlimited subsidiary this lab represents (e.g. 'Zava Power', 'Zava Athletic'). Optional for non-Zava-themed labs.

description.description: One-sentence description shown in launcher list.

estimatedMinutes.description: Approximate end-to-end deploy time in minutes.

prereqs.description: CLI tools that must be on PATH (e.g. 'az', 'azd', 'pwsh', 'python', 'docker', 'srectl').

prompts.description: Values azd cannot infer that the launcher must collect interactively before deploy. Stashed in the lab's azd env.

default.description: Default if the user just presses Enter.

optional.description: If true, blank input is allowed.

sim.description: How the meta-sim launches this lab's own simulator UI when the user picks 'open lab sim'.

args.description: Args relative to the lab's root dir.

envFromConfig.description: If true, the meta-sim reads .lab-config.json (or .deployed/<name>.json) and exports it to env before launching.

scenarios.description: Break/fix scenarios this lab can drive. Exposed in the meta-sim's unified picker. Optional — labs without scenarios just don't show in the unified picker.

runner.description: Path to the runner script relative to the lab root.
